top_signals.title: London AI jobs boom as Anthropic salaries hit £630k
top_signals.summary: London’s AI hiring race is accelerating at dizzying rates, with Anthropic offering some engineers in the capital as much as £630,000 a year as Big Tech firms battle for AI talent. The US AI giant, backed by Amazon and best known for its chatbot Claude, is currently hiring for over 40 London roles as it [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
